TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: Sainr-frog4_lalo a tahaeS
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: korkoring ki 'aehoe' ma' kitkita' ka takem.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ ki ʔæhœʔ maʔ kitkitaʔ ka takəm.
S.FORM: korkoring ki 'aehoe' ma' kitkita' ka takem.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ ki ʔæhœʔ maʔ kitkitaʔ ka takəm.
S.TRANSL: 一個小孩和狗在看青蛙.
A child and a dog were looking at a frog.

S.FORM: takem takem 'leb ray ray binisitan.
S.PHON: takəm takəm ʔləβ raj raj βinis~θitan.
S.FORM: takem takem 'leb ray ray binisitan.
S.PHON: takəm takəm ʔləβ raj raj βinis~θitan.

TRANSL.notes: (They) kept the frog in a bottle.

S.TRANSL: kept the frog in a bottle.

S.FORM: isaa korkoring ki 'aehoe' ma'rem ila.
S.PHON: is~θaa korkoriŋ ki ʔæhœʔ maʔrəm ila.
S.FORM: isaa korkoring ki 'aehoe' ma'rem ila.
S.PHON: is~θaa korkoriŋ ki ʔæhœʔ maʔrəm ila.

TRANSL.notes: The child and the dog (went to) sleep.

S.TRANSL: The child and the dog sleep.

S.FORM: roehaenaen takem nonak kas nonak ma kas'oehaz.
S.PHON: rœhænæn takəm nonak kas~θ nonak ma kas~θʔœhaz~ð.
S.FORM: roehaenaen takem nonak kas nonak ma kas'oehaz.
S.PHON: rœhænæn takəm nonak kas~θ nonak ma kas~θʔœhaz~ð.

TRANSL.notes: 青蛙自己(從瓶子)出來了.
The frog came out (of the bottle) by itself.

S.TRANSL: The frog came out by itself.

S.FORM: isaa ririm'aenaen hini korkoring ki 'aehoe' koSa.
S.PHON: is~θaa ririmʔænæn hini korkoriŋ ki ʔæhœʔ koʃa.
S.FORM: isaa ririm'aenaen hini korkoring ki 'aehoe' koSa.
S.PHON: is~θaa ririmʔænæn hini korkoriŋ ki ʔæhœʔ koʃa.
S.TRANSL: In the morning, the child and the dog said,

S.FORM: o man ka takem hayno' ila hini'.
S.PHON: o man ka takəm hajnoʔ ila hiniʔ.
S.FORM: o man ka takem hayno' ila hini'.
S.PHON: o man ka takəm hajnoʔ ila hiniʔ.

S.FORM: isaa 'am'amoeh am hibae ka kaybaen sa.
S.PHON: is~θaa ʔamʔamœh am hiβæ ka kajβæn s~θa.
S.FORM: isaa 'am'amoeh am hibae ka kaybaen sa.
S.PHON: is~θaa ʔamʔamœh am hiβæ ka kajβæn s~θa.
S.TRANSL: They put on their clothes quickly.

S.FORM: kiim ray kaybaen.
S.PHON: kiim raj kajβæn.
S.FORM: kiim ray kaybaen.
S.PHON: kiim raj kajβæn.

TRANSL.notes: (They) looked (for the frog) in the clothes.

S.FORM: kiim ray kaybaen 'oka' hini' 'aehoe' rima'.
S.PHON: kiim raj kajβæn ʔokaʔ hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ.
S.FORM: kiim ray kaybaen 'oka' hini' 'aehoe' rima'.
S.PHON: kiim raj kajβæn ʔokaʔ hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (The frog) was not (there).

S.FORM: sazek ray binisitan.
S.PHON: s~θaz~ðək raj βinis~θitan.
S.FORM: sazek ray binisitan.
S.PHON: s~θaz~ðək raj βinis~θitan.
S.TRANSL: The dog smelled the inside of the container.

S.FORM: 'oka' isaa.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ is~θaa.
S.FORM: 'oka' isaa.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ is~θaa.

TRANSL.notes: (The frog) was not there.

S.FORM: hini' ka binisitan si a si si tomok ila ray ta'oeloeh noka 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka βinis~θitan s~θi a s~θi s~θi tomok ila raj taʔœlœh noka ʔæhœʔ.
S.FORM: hini' ka binisitan si a si si tomok ila ray ta'oeloeh noka 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka βinis~θitan s~θi a s~θi s~θi tomok ila raj taʔœlœh noka ʔæhœʔ.

TRANSL.notes: The dog (inserted) its head in the bottle.

S.TRANSL: The dog its head in the bottle.

S.FORM: hini' ka korkoring Sa takem So'o hayno' ila.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka korkoriŋ ʃa takəm ʃoʔo hajnoʔ ila.
S.FORM: hini' ka korkoring Sa takem So'o hayno' ila.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka korkoriŋ ʃa takəm ʃoʔo hajnoʔ ila.

TRANSL.notes: 這個小孩(說): 青蛙,你在哪裡?

S.TRANSL: 這個小孩 : 青蛙,你在哪裡?

TRANSL.notes: The child (said), 'Frog, where are you?'

S.FORM: kita'en hini' ka 'aehoe' sahae' sahae' ray hinoehas sahae' ray rai'.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ ka ʔæhœʔ s~θahæʔ s~θahæʔ raj hinœhas~θ s~θahæʔ raj raiʔ.
S.FORM: kita'en hini' ka 'aehoe' sahae' sahae' ray hinoehas sahae' ray rai'.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ ka ʔæhœʔ s~θahæʔ s~θahæʔ raj hinœhas~θ s~θahæʔ raj raiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 看到這隻狗從窗戶掉到地上.

TRANSL.notes: (The child) saw the dog fall on the ground from the window.

S.TRANSL: saw the dog fall on the ground from the window.

S.FORM: isaa ka binisitan minlakay ila hiza'.
S.PHON: is~θaa ka βinis~θitan minlakaj ila hiz~ðaʔ.
S.FORM: isaa ka binisitan minlakay ila hiza'.
S.PHON: is~θaa ka βinis~θitan minlakaj ila hiz~ðaʔ.

S.FORM: 'aehoe' kayzaeh ila 'okay 'okay tatpo'i noka binisitan.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ kajz~ðæh ila ʔokaj ʔokaj tatpoʔi noka βinis~θitan.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' kayzaeh ila 'okay 'okay tatpo'i noka binisitan.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ kajz~ðæh ila ʔokaj ʔokaj tatpoʔi noka βinis~θitan.

TRANSL.notes: The dog was not 'wearing' the bottle (on its head) anymore.

S.TRANSL: The dog was not 'wearing' the bottle anymore.

S.FORM: lasia rima' 'oeS'oeSoe'an ila ki 'aehoe' hini' ka korkoring ki 'aehoe' rima' 'oeS'oeSoe'an Sa 'oe'oe ila.
S.PHON: las~θia rimaʔ ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan ila ki ʔæhœʔ hiniʔ ka korkoriŋ ki ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan ʃa ʔœʔœ ila.
S.FORM: lasia rima' 'oeS'oeSoe'an ila ki 'aehoe' hini' ka korkoring ki 'aehoe' rima' 'oeS'oeSoe'an Sa 'oe'oe ila.
S.PHON: las~θia rimaʔ ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan ila ki ʔæhœʔ hiniʔ ka korkoriŋ ki ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan ʃa ʔœʔœ ila.
S.TRANSL: They went to the mountain with the dog and called out.

S.FORM: hoy takem hayno' ila So'o.
S.PHON: hoj takəm hajnoʔ ila ʃoʔo.
S.FORM: hoy takem hayno' ila So'o.
S.PHON: hoj takəm hajnoʔ ila ʃoʔo.

S.FORM: kita'en hini' 'aehoe' kita' ka boya'.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ kitaʔ ka βojaʔ.
S.FORM: kita'en hini' 'aehoe' kita' ka boya'.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ kitaʔ ka βojaʔ.

S.FORM: boya' hini' 'ampowa' kin 'akoy ka boya'.
S.PHON: βojaʔ hiniʔ ʔampowaʔ kin ʔakoj ka βojaʔ.
S.FORM: boya' hini' 'ampowa' kin 'akoy ka boya'.
S.PHON: βojaʔ hiniʔ ʔampowaʔ kin ʔakoj ka βojaʔ.
S.TRANSL: Why are there so many bees here?

S.FORM: isaa hini' korkoring ayo hini' hayza' ka ka minatang.
S.PHON: is~θaa hiniʔ korkoriŋ ajo hiniʔ hajz~ðaʔ ka ka minataŋ.
S.FORM: isaa hini' korkoring ayo hini' hayza' ka ka minatang.
S.PHON: is~θaa hiniʔ korkoriŋ ajo hiniʔ hajz~ðaʔ ka ka minataŋ.

S.FORM: ka ano'.
S.PHON: ka anoʔ.
S.FORM: ka ano'.
S.PHON: ka anoʔ.

S.FORM: takem mti' ma hayza' ilahani 'izo'.
S.PHON: takəm mtiʔ ma hajz~ðaʔ ilahani ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.FORM: takem mti' ma hayza' ilahani 'izo'.
S.PHON: takəm mtiʔ ma hajz~ðaʔ ilahani ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.TRANSL: The frog may have gone inside there.

S.FORM: hiza 'oe'oe ila sa takem So'o hani ray 'izo'.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ʔœʔœ ila s~θa takəm ʃoʔo hani raj ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.FORM: hiza 'oe'oe ila sa takem So'o hani ray 'izo'.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ʔœʔœ ila s~θa takəm ʃoʔo hani raj ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他在那裡叫:青蛙,你在裡面嗎?
There he called out, Frog, are you there inside?

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' kita' ka boya' Sa.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ kitaʔ ka βojaʔ ʃa.
S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' kita' ka boya' Sa.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ kitaʔ ka βojaʔ ʃa.

S.FORM: hini' kano' isaa noka korkoring 'oe'oe hini' ka.
S.PHON: hiniʔ kanoʔ is~θaa noka korkoriŋ ʔœʔœ hiniʔ ka.
S.FORM: hini' kano' isaa noka korkoring 'oe'oe hini' ka.
S.PHON: hiniʔ kanoʔ is~θaa noka korkoriŋ ʔœʔœ hiniʔ ka.

S.FORM: rarapal hini' kas'oehaz takem.
S.PHON: rarapal hiniʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð takəm.
S.FORM: rarapal hini' kas'oehaz takem.
S.PHON: rarapal hiniʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð takəm.
S.TRANSL: A squirrel came out, not a frog.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' shi kita' ka boya'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ s~θhi kitaʔ ka βojaʔ.
S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' shi kita' ka boya'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ s~θhi kitaʔ ka βojaʔ.

S.FORM: hahli ryo hahli tee ka ka boya'.
S.PHON: hahli rjo hahli təə ka ka βojaʔ.
S.FORM: hahli ryo hahli tee ka ka boya'.
S.PHON: hahli rjo hahli təə ka ka βojaʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (The dog) shook the beehive.

S.FORM: sahae' ila.
S.PHON: s~θahæʔ ila.
S.FORM: sahae' ila.
S.PHON: s~θahæʔ ila.

TRANSL.notes: (蜂窩)掉下來.
(The beehive) fell down.

S.FORM: hini' korkoring kita' ka hiza' ka ray kaehoey minatang.
S.PHON: hiniʔ korkoriŋ kitaʔ ka hiz~ðaʔ ka raj kæhœj minataŋ.
S.FORM: hini' korkoring kita' ka hiza' ka ray kaehoey minatang.
S.PHON: hiniʔ korkoriŋ kitaʔ ka hiz~ðaʔ ka raj kæhœj minataŋ.
S.TRANSL: The child saw a hole up the tree.

S.FORM: koSa takem hao ray 'izo' 'am rima' kiim.
S.PHON: koʃa takəm hao raj ʔiz~ðoʔ ʔam rimaʔ kiim.
S.FORM: koSa takem hao ray 'izo' 'am rima' kiim.
S.PHON: koʃa takəm hao raj ʔiz~ðoʔ ʔam rimaʔ kiim.
S.TRANSL: 他想說青蛙在裡面,就去找.
He thought the frog was inside there, and went to take a look.

S.FORM: ka.
S.PHON: ka.
S.FORM: ka.
S.PHON: ka.

S.FORM: sia homses sahae' ila ray kah ray rai' ray kaehoey babaw ima ma sahae' ray rai'.
S.PHON: s~θia homs~θəs~θ s~θahæʔ ila raj kah raj raiʔ raj kæhœj βaβaw ima ma s~θahæʔ raj raiʔ.
S.FORM: sia homses sahae' ila ray kah ray rai' ray kaehoey babaw ima ma sahae' ray rai'.
S.PHON: s~θia homs~θəs~θ s~θahæʔ ila raj kah raj raiʔ raj kæhœj βaβaw ima ma s~θahæʔ raj raiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他嚇到了,從樹上掉到地上.
He got frightened and fell to the ground from up the tree.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' ma' hahli ka paksahae' ka boya' sowawen ila noka boya'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ maʔ hahli ka paks~θahæʔ ka βojaʔ s~θowawən ila noka βojaʔ.
S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' ma' hahli ka paksahae' ka boya' sowawen ila noka boya'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ maʔ hahli ka paks~θahæʔ ka βojaʔ s~θowawən ila noka βojaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 狗也在搖蜂窩,使蜂窩掉下來,蜂就追狗.

TRANSL.notes: The dog was also shaking the beehive (until it) fell (to the ground), and the bees chased (the dog)

S.TRANSL: The dog was also shaking the beehive fell , and the bees chased

S.FORM: isahini korkoring ma sowawen noka kal'oe.
S.PHON: is~θahini korkoriŋ ma s~θowawən noka kalʔœ.
S.FORM: isahini korkoring ma sowawen noka kal'oe.
S.PHON: is~θahini korkoriŋ ma s~θowawən noka kalʔœ.
S.TRANSL: The owl also chased the child.

S.FORM: ka kaSna'itol ray ray bato' babaw 'oe'oe ila ka takem.
S.PHON: ka kaʃnaʔitol raj raj βatoʔ βaβaw ʔœʔœ ila ka takəm.
S.FORM: ka kaSna'itol ray ray bato' babaw 'oe'oe ila ka takem.
S.PHON: ka kaʃnaʔitol raj raj βatoʔ βaβaw ʔœʔœ ila ka takəm.

TRANSL.notes: (男孩)爬上石頭,叫那個青蛙.
(The boy) climbed up the rock and called the frog.

S.TRANSL: climbed up the rock and called the frog.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' ma' 'ima sazek sa takem hahano.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ maʔ ʔima s~θaz~ðək s~θa takəm hahano.
S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' ma' 'ima sazek sa takem hahano.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ maʔ ʔima s~θaz~ðək s~θa takəm hahano.
S.TRANSL: The dog sniffed for the frog.

S.FORM: 'oe'oe 'oe'oe.
S.PHON: ʔœʔœ ʔœʔœ.
S.FORM: 'oe'oe 'oe'oe.
S.PHON: ʔœʔœ ʔœʔœ.

TRANSL.notes: (The child kept on) calling.

S.FORM: hini' ka 'aehoe' rima' ray bato' hikor.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ raj βatoʔ hikor.
S.FORM: hini' ka 'aehoe' rima' ray bato' hikor.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ raj βatoʔ hikor.
S.TRANSL: The dog went behind the rock.

S.FORM: kita'en ka hini' wae'ae' wae'ae' kas'oehaz homses hini'.
S.PHON: kitaʔən ka hiniʔ wæʔæʔ wæʔæʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð homs~θəs~θ hiniʔ.
S.FORM: kita'en ka hini' wae'ae' wae'ae' kas'oehaz homses hini'.
S.PHON: kitaʔən ka hiniʔ wæʔæʔ wæʔæʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð homs~θəs~θ hiniʔ.

S.FORM: homses isahini ka korkoring totoho hini' ma s sipakai ray wae'ae' a ta'oeloeh.
S.PHON: homs~θəs~θ is~θahini ka korkoriŋ totoho hiniʔ ma s~θ s~θipakai raj wæʔæʔ a taʔœlœh.
S.FORM: homses isahini ka korkoring totoho hini' ma s sipakai ray wae'ae' a ta'oeloeh.
S.PHON: homs~θəs~θ is~θahini ka korkoriŋ totoho hiniʔ ma s~θ s~θipakai raj wæʔæʔ a taʔœlœh.
S.TRANSL: 小孩嚇到了,吊在鹿的頭上.
The child got frightened and hang on top of the deer's head.

S.FORM: wae'ae' ma' homses 'ae'aeaew ila 'ae'aeaew o.
S.PHON: wæʔæʔ maʔ homs~θəs~θ ʔæʔææw ila ʔæʔææw o.
S.FORM: wae'ae' ma' homses 'ae'aeaew ila 'ae'aeaew o.
S.PHON: wæʔæʔ maʔ homs~θəs~θ ʔæʔææw ila ʔæʔææw o.
S.TRANSL: The deer also got frightened and ran away.

S.FORM: mwai' ray 'a ray 'ataS o.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ raj ʔa raj ʔataʃ o.
S.FORM: mwai' ray 'a ray 'ataS o.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ raj ʔa raj ʔataʃ o.

S.FORM: hiza wae'ae' hiza' ka korkoring ki 'aehoe' sahae' ila ray ralom sahae' ray ralom.
S.PHON: hiz~ða wæʔæʔ hiz~ðaʔ ka korkoriŋ ki ʔæhœʔ s~θahæʔ ila raj ralom s~θahæʔ raj ralom.
S.FORM: hiza wae'ae' hiza' ka korkoring ki 'aehoe' sahae' ila ray ralom sahae' ray ralom.
S.PHON: hiz~ða wæʔæʔ hiz~ðaʔ ka korkoriŋ ki ʔæhœʔ s~θahæʔ ila raj ralom s~θahæʔ raj ralom.
S.TRANSL: The child and dog fell into the water.

S.FORM: kita'en yo kano' ray hani Sa kano' ray hani Sa 'ima maatol a.
S.PHON: kitaʔən jo kanoʔ raj hani ʃa kanoʔ raj hani ʃa ʔima maatol a.
S.FORM: kita'en yo kano' ray hani Sa kano' ray hani Sa 'ima maatol a.
S.PHON: kitaʔən jo kanoʔ raj hani ʃa kanoʔ raj hani ʃa ʔima maatol a.

S.FORM: 'iyahimi' isaa ka 'aehoe' Sa t 'iyahimi'.
S.PHON: ʔijahimiʔ is~θaa ka ʔæhœʔ ʃa t ʔijahimiʔ.
S.FORM: 'iyahimi' isaa ka 'aehoe' Sa t 'iyahimi'.
S.PHON: ʔijahimiʔ is~θaa ka ʔæhœʔ ʃa t ʔijahimiʔ.
S.TRANSL: He told the dog to 'be quiet.'

S.FORM: isaa ray kaehoey hikor ray kaehoey hikor kita' ka takem ma maatol.
S.PHON: is~θaa raj kæhœj hikor raj kæhœj hikor kitaʔ ka takəm ma maatol.
S.FORM: isaa ray kaehoey hikor ray kaehoey hikor kita' ka takem ma maatol.
S.PHON: is~θaa raj kæhœj hikor raj kæhœj hikor kitaʔ ka takəm ma maatol.
S.TRANSL: 看到青蛙在樹後面唱歌.

TRANSL.notes: (They) saw the frog singing behind the rock.

S.TRANSL: saw the frog singing behind the rock.

S.FORM: iwa' ay sia mwai' kiim ka taew'an takem mwai' kiim ka taew'an nisia.
S.PHON: iwaʔ aj s~θia mwaiʔ kiim ka tæwʔan takəm mwaiʔ kiim ka tæwʔan nis~θia.
S.FORM: iwa' ay sia mwai' kiim ka taew'an takem mwai' kiim ka taew'an nisia.
S.PHON: iwaʔ aj s~θia mwaiʔ kiim ka tæwʔan takəm mwaiʔ kiim ka tæwʔan nis~θia.
S.TRANSL: So the frog was looking for its home.

S.FORM: kita'en hini' ka 'ima 'ol'ola'an ka takem ma' kas'oehaz ila saboeh.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ ka ʔima ʔolʔolaʔan ka takəm maʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: kita'en hini' ka 'ima 'ol'ola'an ka takem ma' kas'oehaz ila saboeh.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ ka ʔima ʔolʔolaʔan ka takəm maʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila s~θaβœh.
S.TRANSL: 所有的青蛙也都出來了.
All the small frogs came out too.

S.FORM: koSa'en ila ina inoka hiza' a takem a ka ka korkoring.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən ila ina inoka hiz~ðaʔ a takəm a ka ka korkoriŋ.
S.FORM: koSa'en ila ina inoka hiza' a takem a ka ka korkoring.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən ila ina inoka hiz~ðaʔ a takəm a ka ka korkoriŋ.

S.FORM: yao s yao sa 'am lobih ila o hini' ka.
S.PHON: jao s~θ jao s~θa ʔam loβih ila o hiniʔ ka.
S.FORM: yao s yao sa 'am lobih ila o hini' ka.
S.PHON: jao s~θ jao s~θa ʔam loβih ila o hiniʔ ka.

S.FORM: hini takem ma'an kaalibihin.
S.PHON: hini takəm maʔan kaaliβihin.
S.FORM: hini takem ma'an kaalibihin.
S.PHON: hini takəm maʔan kaaliβihin.
S.TRANSL: 這是我的青蛙,我要帶回去.
This is my frog, which I will take back.

S.FORM: isaa ma pil'awan ila kila takem hini' isaa pil'awan takem ma'an hini' a takem kaalibihin ila.
S.PHON: is~θaa ma pilʔawan ila kila takəm hiniʔ is~θaa pilʔawan takəm maʔan hiniʔ a takəm kaaliβihin ila.
S.FORM: isaa ma pil'awan ila kila takem hini' isaa pil'awan takem ma'an hini' a takem kaalibihin ila.
S.PHON: is~θaa ma pilʔawan ila kila takəm hiniʔ is~θaa pilʔawan takəm maʔan hiniʔ a takəm kaaliβihin ila.
S.TRANSL: 我要把我的青蛙帶回去了.
I will take my frog back.

S.FORM: pil'awan.
S.PHON: pilʔawan.
S.FORM: pil'awan.
S.PHON: pilʔawan.
